narrative:
Twinsburg 4-C (precinct in Summit County) has 886 registered voters, with 54.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 12.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 33.7%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 21.7 percentage points.
